notes: Generated with built-in image generation as a more aggressive redo of the Shrapnel Quill Battery horror package.
The redo emphasizes dark gunmetal, scratched off-white armor, red hazard plates, yellow-gold munitions, and stronger cyan neon glow.
The four forms keep a similar runtime footprint while increasing firepower through extra cannons, turret hardware, missile racks, railgun rails, and reactor ports.
The accepted sheet contains six pure robot subjects: four evolution stages, one static shrapnel munition, and one disabled wreck defeat still.
The source used a magenta chroma key. Background removal, grouped slicing, and a particle dust cleanup pass produced transparent runtime assets with no visible magenta leftovers.
